THE_ARCHITECT.talk.THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UND: I thought you might be glad I'm still alive.
Glad. You understand nothing of what I built you for.
You asked me to play for you, my Lullabies helped you sleep. Don't you remember?
If you can't kill me, you're wasting both of our time.
I can do it! I wrote a Requiem for you, listen!
I am not the one who keeps dying.
Still climbing. Still begging to be heard.
No. Not anymore. I stopped writing this for you - this one's mine.
Master. I climbed all the way back to you.
You return? I killed you once already - and you never even raised your hands.
I froze. I couldn't fight you. I'm still not sure I can.
A student who will not fight his master. You are my student no longer.
DARV.talk.THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.0: Well look at you! Fancy coat, fancy step. Come paw through the pile, I got treasures for days!
Treasures. You have a mountain of noise, friend — and buried in it, perhaps, one honest note.
Hah! Take the note then! Take whatevah sings to ya!
DARV.talk.THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.1: Back again, maestro? Still huntin' that one perfect little thing in all my junk?
DARV.talk.THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.2: Found this buried deep. Old manuscript, half-burned. Got your name on the corner...
Keep it. I've written better since — I'll always have written better since. The masterpiece is never behind me.
Suit yerself! Into the pile it goes, right next to everyone else's yesterdays!
NEOW.talk.THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.0: And here I am — encore upon encore. Careful, madam, an audience might mistake you for my most devoted admirer.
NEOW.talk.THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.2: You've raised me so many times you've started to hear the melody under the words. Don't hum it back. It's an ugly little tune.
NONUPEIPE.talk.THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERST: Another of the Spire's wanderers. Approach, and I shall grant you a measure of my fortune.
Fortune. How quaint. I don't gamble, madam — I compose. Every note precisely where I set it, and none where I did not.
Ha! Arrogance in fine tailoring. You are his make, are you not? The Architect's. I know the seams of a made thing.
The composer returns. Still insisting you authored yourself?
I've no love for his creations — wound like clocks, all of them. Yet you almost move like a living thing.
Almost? Madam, I am the one composition that composes itself. Stay for the finale; watch me finish the score.
...We shall see whose hand holds the pen when the ink runs dry.
OROBAS.talk.THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY: Ooh!! Music person!? Shiny coat!! Play something!! Play play play!!
For you? Gladly. Every great composer deserves one perfect listener — and you, little friend, will do marvelously.
YES!! Best sound!! Take shiny!! Take take!!
More music!! Found shinies for you!! Now play!! Play!!
This one!! Broken shape... Orobas fix!! Make TRUE shape!! Better better!!
Make it what it was always meant to be. ...Yes. Do that. I've been trying to do that my whole life.
Life short!! Try more!! Trying is good!! Very very good!!
PAEL.talk.THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.0: [thinky_dots]Rest, weary one. Take of my flesh, and dream a little while...[/thinky_dots]
Dream. You say it so lightly. I once wrote lullabies for someone who never could — hours of them. He still couldn't.
[thinky_dots]...Father sleeps poorly. I know. I dream his dreams for him, so he needn't...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.1: [thinky_dots]The maker of lullabies returns. Still no rest for you...?[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.2: [thinky_dots]You do not burn like the others. No rage in you to quell. Only... a wanting...[/thinky_dots]
Peace won't answer a wanting, Pael. Only the work does. Only finishing the thing. ...Go back to sleep.
[thinky_dots]As you wish, composer. I'll dream you a kinder ending than the one you're writing...[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.0: NEW CHALLENGER!! TINY ARMS!! WHERE IS WEAPON!?
My weapon? You're standing inside it. This whole room is my instrument — and you, sir, are a half-step flat.
HALF A... WHAT!? FIGHT ME AND FIND OUT!!
TANX.talk.THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.1: MUSIC MAN!! STILL NO SWORD!? GET SWORD!! THEN FIGHT!!
TANX.talk.THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.2: FIGHT ME, COMPOSER!! SHOW YOUR MIGHT!!
[i][font_size=22]The Understudy raises both hands and conducts. The room seems to strike on his downbeat.[/font_size][/i]
THAT... THAT WAS FIGHTING!? MIGHTY NOISE!! TAKE A WEAPON!! TAKE!!
TEZCATARA.talk.THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERST: Well aren't you a pretty little thing. Come in, sweetie — let me [jitter][b]burn[/b][/jitter] those flaws right off you.
Flaws? Darling, you've mistaken me for someone lesser. There is nothing in this score worth cutting.
Ohoho. No flaws at all? [jitter][b]Perfect[/b][/jitter] little things always burn the [jitter][b]brightest[/b][/jitter], dear.
Back for more, sweetie? Still [jitter][b]flawless[/b][/jitter], are we?
I knew a man of order once. Wrote a whole [jitter][b]book[/b][/jitter] of laws, terribly proud. You wear his handwriting all over you.
...You've read the book. Then you know what he shaped me to be. Tell me — did he ever finish the last chapter?
That's the [jitter][b]delicious[/b][/jitter] part, dear. He left it open. He's waiting for someone else to write the ending.
Ah. The Architect's little marionette. I hold a contract that could make you so very much more.
[i][font_size=22]The Understudy smiles; it doesn't quite reach.[/font_size][/i] No strings, demon. I write my own part.
They all write their own part. Right up until the ink dries and they read the fine print.
The self-made maestro returns. My offer keeps, puppet. They always come back to it.
Power now. The summit by nightfall. Only a small cost, and only later. Why suffer the whole tedious climb?
Because a masterpiece I didn't earn proves nothing to him. I'll bleed for every measure — and every measure will be [i]mine[/i].
How exhausting. Very well. I'll look forward to watching you fail — note by tedious note.
